name: cc.operandi/operandi
description: Grounded, safety-checked appliance operation packages for robots and agents. Zero-config trial.

environmentVariables.name: OPERANDI_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Base URL of the OPERANDI API (default https://api.operandi.cc; use your hosted URL in prod).

environmentVariables.name: OPERANDI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional: your OPERANDI key. Leave unset for a zero-config instant trial (the server mints + caches its own key, 2 packages included).
